goal: Enterprise multi-level triage for GCP IAM and secret exposure scanner findings.

levels.name: Level 1 - Governance
levels.description: Defines schema, policy, and confidence gate requirements.

levels.name: Level 2 - Specialist Analysis
levels.description: Runs dedicated IAM and secret-risk analysis lanes.

levels.name: Level 3 - Committee Decisioning
levels.description: Correlates findings, applies merge-gate policy, and reports outcomes.
